allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); k=list\(d.keys\(\)\); print\('Top keys:', k\); inner = d.get\('installed'\) or d.get\('web'\) or {}; print\('Type:', 'installed' if 'installed' in d else 'web' if 'web' in d else 'unknown'\); print\('client_id:', inner.get\('client_id','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('project_id:', inner.get\('project_id','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('redirect_uris:', inner.get\('redirect_uris','NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('Has client_secret:', 'YES' if inner.get\('client_secret'\) else 'NO'\)")
